ab: taneng kaku micaliw tu kalisiw i tisuwan?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: taneng tu, pina ku kaydihan isu tu kalisiw?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: makatawal muala tu kalisiw kaku, taneng micaliw kaku tu kalisiw i tisuwan haw?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: nayi’ aca ku niala aku tu kalisiw!
en: B: I don’t have any money either!

ab: makatawal muala tu kalisiw kaku, taneng micaliw kaku tu kalisiw i tisuwawan haw?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: kai’, nicaliwan naayaw caay henay kisu panukas i takuwan
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven’t paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: taneng kaku haw micaliw tu zikuc nu misu?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: hang, a u isu tu ku mualaay.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: taneng caliwan aku ku cudad isu haw?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: mapacaliw tu aku ci Puhayan.
en: B: I lent it to Puhay.

ab: pacaliwen kaku tu batikal isu kapah tu haw?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: hang, nika panukasen kaku anucila.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: maudad tu, nayi’ ku niala aku tu cacebalan, pacaliwen kaku tu cacebalan.
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It’s raining, I don’t have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: izaw/idaw ku cacay a cacebalan aku, maladay kita micebal!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let’s stick together!

ab: nipacaliwan isu i takuwan a cudad, panukas tisuwan.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: anu maydih henay miazi tu canan a cudad sakamu han kaku.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: ayaan kaku a panukas tu nicaliwan a kalisiw i tisuwan
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: payawan, anu izaw ku kalisiw isu itawya han tu.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It’s okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: ayaan kisu panukas tu kalisiw i takuwan?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: panukas han aku ancila kisu.
en: A: I’ll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: ayaan kisu panukas tu cudad aku?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: namapanukas tu aku nacila i tisuwan?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn’t I return it to you yesterday?

ab: nipacaliw ni Buting kuyni a sasulitan?
en: A: Did Buting lend you this pen?

ab: hang, nicaliwan aku ayza cinizaan/cinidaan.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: nicaliwan isu kuyni a sasulitan i ci Kanasawan?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Kanasaw?

ab: caay, nicakayan ni ina kuyni.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: nayi’ tu ku cihah, katayza ci Nakawan micaliw.
en: A: We are out of salt, so let’s go borrow some from Nakaw.

ab: hang, aku ku tayzaay micaliw.
en: B: Okay, I’ll borrow it.

ab: katayza ci Tipusan papanukas tu kalisiw i takuwan.
en: B: Go tell Tipus to give me my money back.

ab: pina ku pitadah niza i tisuwan saw?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
